name: Sisibakwat-Okwemin (Sugared Cherries)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the maple sugar and water in a pot.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and continue boiling for 15 minutes.
4. Add the cherries to the mixture and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Turn off the heat, allow the mixture to cool completely.
6. Serve fresh with bannock.
